Traffic Arbitrage:
Buying Banner Ads
About Banner Advertising:
System Description: Banner advertising can produce a large
amount of traffic to your website. This system will focus on how
to research banner opportunities, how to find media kit and rate
card information, as well as, basic banner design guidelines. Af-
ter completion of this system you should have an understanding
of where you can buy banner advertising space.
Required Skills: Necessary skills required include basic comput-
er and internet skills, ability to follow instructions, can research
websites using Google and other search engines, can contact and
negotiate with ad reps.
System Checklist:
Step 1: Researching Banner Opportunities, Video 1
Action Steps:
1. Search Google for your industry/niche.
2. Locate websites about the topic.
3. Look for banners above the fold.
4. Locate advertising information and request media
kit and rate card.
5. Contact and Negotiate.
Note: take note of any AdSense Ads and target
those sites using Placement targeting.
Weekly Action Plan:
Day 1 Task Checklist:
Research banner placements.
Browse Adbrite’s site directory.
Request media kit and rate
card information.
Day 2 Task Checklist:
Review rate card and media
kit information.
Determine ad placement.
Contact ad reps and discuss
rates and deadlines.
Day 3 Task Checklist:
In-house ad creation.
order banner creation (if us-
ing another company).
Day 4 Task Checklist:

-- 1 of 2 --

Step 2: Banner Guidelines and Suggestions, Video 2
Action Steps:
1. Banner Design: Blend in or stick out.
2. Banner Message: Sell the click not the product.
3. Banner Action: tell them where to click.
4. Banner Placement: Stay above the fold (visible
without scrolling).
5. Banner Sizes: Best sizes are 336 x 280 or 160 x 600.
Step 3: Introduction to Adbrite, Video 3
Action Steps:
1. Search the Adbrite site directory Google.
2. Browse the categories.
3. Locate pricing information and set your maximum
bid price.
4. Upload banners and submit for approval.
System Checklist:
Tips for Making the Most of This Traffic System:
When looking for banner and email opportunities don’t limit
your marketing research to your specific industry or niche. Re-
search and seek out complimentary products and services and
advertise there as well.
Banner Placement:
www.Adbrite.com
Search in Google for indus-
try and niche websites
Banner Design:
www.HeyBannerBanner.com
www.elance.com
Search in Google: banner ad
designer
Weekly Action Plan:
Research banner placements.
Browse the Adbrite site
directory.
Request media kit and rate
card information.
Day 5 Task Checklist:
Review rate card and media
kit information.
Determine ad placement.
Contact ad rep and discuss
rates and deadlines.
